title: 宝塚記念の後に・Weave a Story

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Please work... Please reach everyone...

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, Fine Motion!
What an incredible run!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Urk... ugh... Sniffle!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Huh?! What are you crying for?!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
I-it's just... Fine Motion... She looks so happy! She
looks like she's having so much fun!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
She was glowing so brightly! I don't think I'll ever
forget this sight of her!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion! I'll never forget the way you ran
today!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Hi, Fine! U-um...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hey, Rob Roy!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Hyah!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'm so happy right now. I think my wish actually
reached someone's heart!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
On top of that, the race was so splendid!
Everyone's intensity gave me chills. And—

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Pardon? What is it? Did I say something funny?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Oh, u-um... I was just thinking that you're like a
character from a story.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Oh?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I've thought this for some time. You're like a main
character that everyone loves.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
One from a tense, thrilling, heart-pounding story
that leaves one with a smile on their face!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
People will want to pass down the story of how
you ran today for generations.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: I'm so glad that I could be a part of it!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: A story... I see.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Let's make such an impact no that one ever
forgets the name Fine Motion!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I understand now. Things have been in motion for
some time.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: There's no need for me to be sad. After all...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I'm still running inside of everyone's hearts.

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Wow, what a great race.
It seems like Fine Motion is over whatever was
bothering her!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Right?! It felt great just watching her. I can't wait
to see her run again!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...Ugh, damn it. I don't feel even a byte of
satisfaction.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I suppose you couldn't defy fate either, in the
end. As for me...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion returns to the waiting room with a
cheerful smile on her face.
choice_data_list: What's got you in such a good mood?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Why, today's race, of course! What else could it
be?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I yelled out "Don't you forget me!" and suddenly
running felt better than ever before!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I don't yet know if I actually made an impact, but today has definitely been carved into my heart!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I want to run more races like this! There's still
time, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Considering her achievements so far, I'd like for
her to keep producing results in the G1 races,
but...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: That's it! I've just had a splendid idea.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I have a request. I want to run somewhere I
haven't been before!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
The further I travel, the more people can see me
race and remember me.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I want to leave my mark on the hearts of as many
people as possible.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: And to do that, I need to go to them!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I understand her desire, but choosing a race isn't
always so simple. I have to consider her current
ability and that of her competition.
choice_data_list: Where were you thinking, by the way?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hmmm...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Oh, ramen!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Each region has its own signature ramen, right?
Shakur made an app for me so I can make a note
of all the restaurants I'm interested in.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I haven't actually been able to go to many of
them, but the places with the most are probably...
Fukuoka or Hokkaido.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hearing "Hokkaido" reminds me that I recently
heard a certain notable Umamusume has
registered for a race in Sapporo. Fine Motion
could make great memories there.
choice_data_list: Then, how about the Sapporo Kinen?
Then, how about the Sapporo Kinen?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oooh! Sapporo ramen! I'd love to go and try
some! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
That's not all, of course! I want the people of
Hokkaido to see me run.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Off to Sapporo we go! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, we set our sights on the Sapporo Kinen!
